text: I have worked in quality assurance for six years.
I have tested hundreds of systems.
I worked at WIPRO for six years.
Hi Ana, thanks for joining. I am Mark, the tech lead for our remote QA team. So, tell me a little about yourself.
Hi Mark, nice to meet you. I am a systems analyst, and I have worked in quality assurance for six years.
Great. What exactly do you do in your current role?
I test and validate new features before we deploy them. I find the bug before it reaches the user.
That is exactly what we need. This role is fully remote, working with stakeholders in three countries.
That sounds perfect. I am looking for full remote work, and I am ready for the next step.
Hi, I am Ana, a systems analyst in quality assurance.
I have worked in QA for six years.
I test and validate software before we deploy it.
I am looking for full remote work with an international team.

Good morning, everyone, and welcome to today's stand-up. Thanks for joining from so many different countries. Before we start, a quick reminder: we have a release on Friday, so the QA team needs to finish testing the new payment feature by Thursday. If you find any critical bugs, please report them right away and tag me. I know some of you are working remotely across different time zones, so let's keep our updates short and clear. Okay, let's go around the team. Who would like to start?

Hi Ana, this is Mark Feldman calling from TechNova. Thanks again for your application for the Senior QA Analyst position. I have reviewed your profile, and I am really impressed. Six years in quality assurance is exactly what we are looking for. I would like to invite you to a video interview next Tuesday at three in the afternoon, your time. The role is fully remote, so you can work from São Paulo. Please reply to my email to confirm. I am looking forward to speaking with you. Take care.

First, Ana introduces herself: her name, her role, and her company. Then she explains how long she has worked in quality assurance. Next, Mark asks about her work with software and testing. After that, Ana describes what she is working on right now. Finally, they agree to schedule a video interview and follow up by email.
